parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ blocks: [ { type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '⏰ Stale PR Roundup — ' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10), emoji: true } }, { type: 'divider' }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Warning: PRs stale 2-4 days (' + $json.total_warnings + '):*\n' + $json.warnings.map(function(p) { return p.slack_line; }).join('\n') } }, { type: 'divider' }, { type: 'context', elements: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: 'ShipWatch • Total stale: ' + $json.total_stale + ' | Warnings: ' + $json.total_warnings + ' | Critical: ' + $json.total_critical }] } ], text: '⏰ Stale PR Roundup — ' + $json.total_stale + ' PRs need attention' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ escalation_type: 'stale_pr', github_url: $json.url, github_repo: $env.GITHUB_REPO, author: $json.author, days_stale: $json.days_stale, escalated_to: '#leads' }) }}
